title: Honoring Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority, Inc.®, on reaching the historic milestone of 117 years of serving communities.
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.
subjects: Social work, volunteer service, charitable organizations
crs_summary: This resolution congratulates and commends Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority Inc. for its 117 years of service.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.
